name: Yellow Biscuit
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a cup with milk.
2. Add to the dry ingredients.
3. Roll and cut the dough.
4. Fold in half and butter it.
5. Let rise for 30 minutes and bake.
>From Favorite recipes of Colfax Country Club Women, 1946 by Mrs. John Floyd, Farley
Typed by Ethel Snyder
Date August 12, 1997
